title: astragalus tataricus
intro: Astragalus tataricus, also known as Huangqi in traditional Chinese medicine, is a perennial plant that belongs to the legume family. The root of this plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immune-boosting effects. The health benefits of Astragalus tataricus include reducing fatigue and stress, improving cardiovascular health, and enhancing the body's natural defense against infections and diseases. Astragalus tataricus can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or powder, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
